summary: Frontend testing for THE LIONEYO product modal layout, responsive design, payment buttons, admin forms, and /product/:slug route. Most features passing. Key issue: products in DB have no 'slug' field, so Share buttons (card + modal header) are hidden by conditional rendering.

ui_bugs.issue: Share buttons (data-testid=share-card-{id} and share-btn-{id}) are NOT visible because existing 24 products in Supabase DB have no 'slug' field. The code conditionally renders share buttons only when product.slug exists. Need to either set slugs on existing products or auto-generate on save.
ui_bugs.priority: MEDIUM - data/migration issue, not a code bug

action_items: Set 'slug' field on existing products in Supabase DB (run a migration or update via admin edit). Without slugs, share buttons won't appear on any existing product cards or modal headers.
Razorpay /api/razorpay/create-order returns 404 in preview environment (MOCKED - expected, not tested)
critical_code_review_comments: Products fetched from Supabase have no slug set; admin slug input is present in ProductForm but existing products were created before slug field was added. Admin should be able to edit existing products to add slugs.
ProductDetailPage /product/test-slug correctly renders the app's own 404-style 'PRODUCT NOT FOUND' page (not a browser 404) - route is working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: 24 products in Supabase, none have slug set. Share buttons are hidden (correct code behavior). All modal layout features work: lny-box max-width 1160px, max-height 90vh, two-column desktop, single-column mobile (430px). Image object-fit:contain confirmed. payment-online, payment-partial-cod, whatsapp-order-btn, size buttons (XS-XXL), pricing-summary all present. Partial COD shows breakdown (Pay Now / Pay on Delivery). Admin: product-slug-input in ProductForm, partial-cod-amount-input + cod-enabled-toggle in SiteSettingsForm all present. /product/:slug route renders ProductDetailPage correctly.

test_results.share_btn_on_cards: FAIL - 0 share buttons (products have no slug in DB)
test_results.category_labels: PASS - STREETWEAR, IIT, MEN'S, WOMEN'S labels visible
test_results.partial_cod_breakdown: PASS - Pay Now + Pay on Delivery shown
test_results.size_buttons_all: PASS - XS S M L XL XXL all found
test_results.product_detail_page_route: PASS - /product/:slug renders ProductDetailPage (shows PRODUCT NOT FOUND for invalid slug)
test_results.app_js_slug_route: PASS - Route path='/product/:slug' exists in App.js
